corrections.erc7201_slot: manifest's 0xac6b9d62...f6700 is NOT the ERC-7201 slot for 'glyph.storage.session.v1'; correct computed slot 0x07d2f48c801d2b2cb4b6045c6ab259930c8bedfd901510428297972876083700 is used

capabilities.description: Deploys a distinct cryptographic execution envelope (Vessel) containing optional value and/or EIP-7702 session boundaries.

salt.description: Unique 32-byte seed for off-chain OCC parallel isolation math.

vesselType.description: 0 = ValueOnly Link, 1 = AuthorityOnly Session, 2 = Hybrid Link

tokenAddress.description: Target asset contract address. Set to 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 for native MON.

weiAmount.description: Total liquidity value to lock inside the escrow state mapping, denominated strictly in wei units.

gatekeeperKeyHash.description: The public ECDSA address derived client-side from the passcode hash to enforce front-run validation.
